title: Incident in an Alley
writer: Harold Medford, Orville H. Hampton, Rod Serling
actors: Chris Warfield, Jacklyn O'Donnell, Harp McGuire
plot: Based on a short story by Rod Serling ("The Twilight Zone"), a cop "mistakenly" kills a 14-year-old boy during a robbery. Although acquitted for the shooting, the cop is haunted by his crime.
